title: ASI Proof Horizon Console
governanceLaw: Capability pressure narrows authority; search control never grants outcome authority.
claimBoundary: No achieved AGI, achieved ASI, superintelligence, empirical SOTA, production certification, live invention authority, autonomous sovereignty, guaranteed return, external audit completion, or civilization-scale capability is claimed. Stronger claims require real tasks, baselines, executed evidence, replayable ProofBundles, safety/cost ledgers, validator reports, delayed outcomes, and independent review.
